title: NTM Interiors AIT Datapack
description: A Datapack for the Adventures in time mod that brings the interiors from the New Tardis Mod
body:
The **Adventures in Time** datapack brings the iconic and ever-changing interiors of the TARDIS into your Minecraft world, providing an immersive Doctor Who experience. Integrating seamlessly with the **New TARDIS Mod**, this datapack lets players explore the intricate and diverse rooms that define the Doctor's time machine. Whether you're a long-time fan of Doctor Who or just someone who loves exploring unique, detailed spaces in Minecraft, this datapack is sure to enhance your adventure.

## Features:
- **Complete Integration:** Fully compatible with the New TARDIS Mod's interiors, allowing for a seamless experience.
- **Immersive Time Travel:** Feel like you're really traveling through time as you explore the vast and shifting interior of the TARDIS.
- **Customizable Settings:** Tailor your TARDIS adventure by choosing different room layouts and designs to fit your gameplay.

This datapack is perfect for anyone looking to add a new layer of excitement to their Minecraft adventures, offering endless possibilities for exploration and discovery. Whether you're using it to enhance your own Doctor Who-themed world or just looking to experience the TARDIS firsthand, Adventures in Time brings the magic of time travel to life in a whole new way.

If you like what I do and want to see more, check out my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/2ZSVcuT3a5) and [Youtube Chanel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCYQTOpyfm2zcheJjSNMZ7Yg)

## Q and A
- Q: Why isn't the coral interior from the NTM in this datapack
- A: Because it was pointless since AIT has aperfectly good one, also it would be hard to convert it.

- Q: The interiors arent showing the images and the names are weird
- A: You are missing the optional dependency for the datapack

# Credits
- **HUGE** credit to the NTM developers, go check out their [Wiki Page](https://tardis-mod.com/) and [Curseforge link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/new-tardis-mod)
- also a big thank you to the developers and moderators on the [AIT Discord Server](https://discord.gg/mygxNRWb8U) for helping me finish this project since i believe i couldn't have done it without them.
